subcodes.first_line: O my God! The darkness of separation hath enveloped all horizons, and the fire of yearning hath burst into flame, and the lamp of burning grief hath been lit, and the moth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی ظلمت فرقت آفاقی قاپلادی و آتش حسرت شعله لندی و شمع حرقت پارلادی و پروانه
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
